description.name: GetYourBD .bd Domain Integration
description.tagline: WHMCS .bd lookup and registration through the GetYourBD Partner API.
description.long: Adds .bd WHOIS lookup support, checkout fields for GetYourBD-required registrant data, and a registrar module that creates GetYourBD partner domain orders after WHMCS payment automation triggers registration.
features: Adds and removes the .bd WHOIS server entry through addon activation lifecycle
Persists NID and mobile details and provides secure customer document uploads
Provisions BDT and USD registration and renewal pricing from the GetYourBD pricing API
Creates GetYourBD partner domain orders with HTTP Basic Auth and multipart form data
